core.name: Core
core.description: The foundation of every Aspire application

deploy.name: Deployment
deploy.description: Publishing to Docker Compose and Kubernetes

polyglot.name: Polyglot
polyglot.description: C#, Node.js, Python, and Vite resources

concepts.label: AppHost
concepts.description: The heart of every Aspire app — orchestrates all resources and services.

concepts.label: DistributedApplication
concepts.description: The entry point: DistributedApplication.CreateBuilder() sets up the app model.

concepts.label: PostgreSQL
concepts.description: Add a PostgreSQL server with AddPostgres() and databases with AddDatabase().

concepts.label: Redis
concepts.description: Add a Redis cache with AddRedis() — blazing-fast in-memory data store.

concepts.label: SQL Server
concepts.description: Add SQL Server with AddSqlServer() and databases for relational workloads.

concepts.label: MongoDB
concepts.description: Add MongoDB with AddMongoDB() for document-based data storage.

concepts.label: RabbitMQ
concepts.description: Add RabbitMQ with AddRabbitMQ() for message broker communication.

concepts.label: Kafka
concepts.description: Add Apache Kafka with AddKafka() for event streaming.

concepts.label: Container
concepts.description: Add any container with AddContainer(name, image) — Docker images as resources.

concepts.label: Project
concepts.description: Add .NET projects with AddProject<T>() — the most common resource type.

concepts.label: Parameter
concepts.description: Define configurable values with AddParameter() for secrets and settings.

concepts.label: ConnectionString
concepts.description: Reference external resources with AddConnectionString() for pre-existing services.

concepts.label: WithReference
concepts.description: Wire services together — injects connection strings or endpoint references.

concepts.label: WaitFor
concepts.description: Control startup order — wait for dependencies to be healthy before starting.

concepts.label: WithEnvironment
concepts.description: Set environment variables with static strings, expressions, or callbacks.

concepts.label: WithEndpoint
concepts.description: Define custom endpoints with full protocol control and named endpoints.

concepts.label: WithDataVolume
concepts.description: Attach persistent volumes to containers for data that survives restarts.

concepts.label: WithArgs
concepts.description: Pass CLI arguments, scale with replicas, and expose external endpoints.

concepts.label: ServiceDefaults
concepts.description: Shared project that configures OpenTelemetry, health checks, and resilience.

concepts.label: OpenTelemetry
concepts.description: Distributed tracing, structured logging, and metrics with OTLP export.

concepts.label: HealthChecks
concepts.description: IHealthCheck registration and monitoring — how Aspire knows your services are ready.

concepts.label: Resilience
concepts.description: Retry policies, circuit breakers, and timeout strategies for robust services.

concepts.label: ServiceDiscovery
concepts.description: How services find each other at runtime — HttpClient integration and config-based resolution.

concepts.label: Docker Compose
concepts.description: Generate docker-compose.yaml from the Aspire app model.

concepts.label: Kubernetes
concepts.description: Generate Kubernetes manifests and Helm charts from the Aspire app model.

concepts.label: PublishAs*
concepts.description: Per-resource publishing customization — PublishAsDockerComposeService, PublishAsKubernetesService.

concepts.label: C# Apps
concepts.description: Add C# apps by path with AddCSharpApp() — an alternative to project references.

concepts.label: Node.js
concepts.description: Run Node.js scripts as resources with AddNodeApp().

concepts.label: Python
concepts.description: Run Python scripts and ASGI apps with AddPythonApp() and AddUvicornApp().

concepts.label: Vite
concepts.description: Vite-based frontends with AddViteApp() and dev server integration.
